tasks.label: PX4 SITL
tasks.command: cd PX4-Autopilot; PX4_GZ_WORLDS=/sitl/gz/worlds GZ_SIM_RESOURCE_PATH=/sitl/gz/models:/sitl/gz/worlds PX4_GZ_WORLD=default make px4_sitl gz_x500_depth

tasks.label: Mission Triangle
tasks.command: cd ws; source install/setup.bash; colcon build --packages-select mission; ros2 run mission triangle

tasks.label: Mission Arm Takeoff
tasks.command: cd ws; source install/setup.bash; colcon build --packages-select mission; ros2 run mission arm_takeoff

tasks.label: Mission HITL
tasks.command: cd ws; source install/setup.bash; colcon build --packages-select mission; ros2 run mission hitl

tasks.label: Image Bridge
tasks.command: cd ws; source install/setup.bash; ros2 run ros_gz_image image_bridge /camera

tasks.label: Camera Script
tasks.command: cd ws; source install/setup.bash; python3 src/mission/mission/camera.py
